word: G4510 - ῥυπόω - rhypóō - rhoo-po'-o - Be filthy

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ῥυπόω

- Transliteration: Rhupoo

- Phonetic: rhoo-po'-o

- Definition:

1. to make filthy, defile, soil

2. to be filthy (morally)

- Origin: from G4509

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4509; to soil that is (intransitively) to become dirty (morally): - be filthy.
